coroutine_architecture.description: Structured concurrency patterns and coroutine lifecycle management
look_for: GlobalScope usage instead of structured coroutineScope/supervisorScope
runBlocking in production code paths (acceptable only in main/test entry points)
Unstructured launch/async that escapes parent scope cancellation
Missing SupervisorJob for independent child failure isolation
Flow collection without proper lifecycle awareness (e.g., missing flowWithLifecycle)
skip: Test code using runBlocking for coroutine test harness
CLI main() entry points that bridge to suspend world
Build scripts and Gradle plugin code

null_safety_discipline.description: Kotlin null-safety features used effectively to prevent runtime NPEs
look_for: Excessive !! (non-null assertion) instead of safe calls (?.) or null checks
Platform type propagation from Java interop without explicit nullability annotations
lateinit var on types that could use lazy or nullable initialization
Unsafe casts (as) where safe casts (as?) with fallback would be appropriate
Missing @Nullable/@NonNull annotations on Java interop boundaries
skip: Test code where !! on known-good values improves readability
Generated code from frameworks (Dagger, Room, etc.)
Inline assertion helpers that intentionally throw on null
